title: polygala vulgaris var. littoralis
intro: Polygala vulgaris var. littoralis, also known as Shore Spurred Vetchling or Littoral Polygala, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Polygala vulgaris var. littoralis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and digestive problems. This plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
